items.name: RFX Suite
items.description: One subscription, every RFX Maya tool. All current plugins, all future updates — plus one newly finished plugin added every month.
items.long_description:
RFX Suite — the complete Maya toolkit

One subscription unlocks every RFX Maya plugin in this hub, current and future.

What's included

- Every paid RFX Maya plugin — lighting, camera, lookdev and workflow tools
- All updates for every tool, automatically through RFX Hub
- One newly finished plugin added to the suite every month
- Activate on this machine with a single license key

How it works

Subscribe on Gumroad, paste your membership license key into RFX Hub once, and every suite plugin unlocks instantly. Your key re-validates automatically — cancel any time and keep access until your term ends.

Why a suite

Individual tools solve individual problems. The suite is a workflow: aim lights, browse light maps, manage focus, organize scenes — built by a working artist, used in production, and growing every month.

The Nuke Diagnostic Suite is a separate professional product and is not part of this subscription.

items.name: RFX Light Target
items.description: Target and aim area lights to any mesh or surface in Maya with one click. Distance control, angle snapping and Arnold-aware intensity presets included.
items.long_description:
What it does

Place a target locator anywhere in your scene — at world origin, snapped to any mesh surface with a single click, or linked to a shared target that multiple lights track simultaneously. Every light stays aimed at its target through an aim constraint. Move the target, the light follows. Move the light, it still faces the target. Set it once and never touch your light rotation again.

Single light workflow

- Create target at world origin or snap it to any mesh surface in one click
- Reposition the target to a new surface point at any time without breaking the constraint
- Hide, show, lock, resize and rename your target locator
- Unlink a light from its target without deleting the locator
- Full undo support on every operation

Multi-light workflow

- See all your Arnold lights in a checklist with their target name shown at a glance
- Create individual targets for every selected light in one operation
- Create one shared target and aim every selected light at it simultaneously
- Link any new light to an existing shared target at any time
- Bulk hide, show, lock, unlock, and delete targets across your entire lighting rig

Built for production

- Target names persist after rename — the plugin tracks targets by UUID so nothing breaks
- UI preferences and light-target links are saved with your Maya scene file
- Works alongside other RFX plugins without any conflicts
- Dockable panel — park it anywhere in your Maya layout
- Auto-refreshes when lights are added or deleted from the scene

Requirements

- Maya 2025 or 2026
- Arnold / MtoA 5.5.x or later
- Windows 10 or 11
- Python and PySide6 are bundled with Maya — no additional installs needed

What's included

- RFX_LightTarget plugin folder — ready to install
- One-click shelf installer
- PDF installation guide with step-by-step instructions

Installation takes under two minutes. Drop the plugin folder into your Maya scripts directory, paste four lines into the Script Editor, click OK. That's it. A shelf button appears and you're ready to go.

Built by Amar Shinde at Reimagine Fx. Questions or issues — reach out on Discord (Reimagine Fx Community) or at reimaginefx@gmail.com. If the plugin saves you time, a review means the world.

items.name: Focus Picker
items.description: FREE camera focus tool for Maya. Click-to-pick Arnold DOF focus distance via viewport raycasting. Two-way sync with Arnold AE for instant depth-of-field control.
items.long_description:
RFX FocusPicker — Arnold Camera Focus Tool for Maya

Stop reading numbers from the HUD. Stop typing them in by hand. One click in the viewport sets your focus distance instantly.

What it does

RFX FocusPicker is a professional depth-of-field workflow tool for Maya and Arnold. It replaces the slow, frustrating process of manually finding and entering focus distances with a single viewport ray-cast. Click any surface in your scene and the exact distance is measured and written directly to your Arnold camera — no HUD, no guesswork, no interruption to your creative flow.

Features

- One-click viewport pick — click any mesh surface to set focus distance instantly
- Live two-way sync — change values in the plugin and they update in Arnold's attribute editor immediately, and vice versa. Edit from the Channel Box, Arnold tab, or our tool — everything stays in sync
- Ctrl+MMB drag on the field or drag the label to scrub values exactly like Maya's Channel Box
- DOF toggle — enable and disable Arnold depth of field with a single checkbox
- Aperture control — adjust aiApertureSize with full scrub support
- Camera management — create new RFX cameras, delete cameras, and switch between all render cameras in the scene from one dropdown
- Refresh without losing your camera — clicking Refresh always returns to your current camera, never jumps to a different one
- Resizable window — drag the window wider to give your controls more room
- One-click shelf installer — installs a button on the ReimagineFx_Tools shelf automatically. Safe to run multiple times, never creates duplicates
- Arnold-first with native Maya fallback — works with Arnold cameras. Falls back to native Maya focus attributes if Arnold is not present

Requirements

- Maya 2025 or Maya 2026
- Arnold for Maya (MtoA) installed and loaded
- Windows 10 or 11

What's included

- RFX FocusPicker plugin folder (ready to install)
- Step-by-step Installation Guide PDF
- Shelf installer script

Installation takes under two minutes. Copy one folder to your Maya scripts directory, paste four lines into the Script Editor, and you're done. Full instructions are included in the PDF.

About Reimagine Fx

RFX FocusPicker was built by Amar Shinde at Reimagine Fx to help 3D Artists work faster and smarter inside Maya and Arnold. Every detail was crafted to fit naturally into your existing workflow — not replace it.

If you enjoy using the tool, please consider leaving a review or sharing it with a fellow artist. It means the world to us and helps us keep building professional tools for the Maya community.

www.reimaginefx.com

items.name: Area Light Maps Pro
items.description: 145 pro area-light textures plus a full lighting cockpit for Maya & Arnold. Browse, apply, mix, link and rig every area light from one panel.
items.long_description:
Area Light Maps Pro — Light Like a Pro, in One Panel

Stop fighting your area lights. Start art-directing them. Area Light Maps Pro is a lighting cockpit for Maya + Arnold. Browse a curated library of softbox, octabox and studio light textures, apply them to your area lights with one click, then mix, link and rig your whole setup — without leaving the panel.

What you get

- 145 ready-to-use area light maps — 2048×2048 EXR across 11 categories (Softboxes, Octaboxes, Ring Lights, Beauty Dishes, LED Panels, Strip Lights, Umbrellas, Reflectors, Gels, Specialty/Cinematic, Classic)
- A gorgeous browser — search, filter, favourite, apply with one click (double-click spawns a fresh light); live preview, dark native-feeling UI
- Light Mixer — every area light as a clean strip: mute, solo, exposure, color temperature, tint and instant map-swap, each with a thumbnail; state saves with your Maya file
- Light Linking — link any light to only the objects you want, or back to everything, in one click
- One-click rigs — Three-Point, Clamshell, Rim Pair, Product Ring or Single Key setups that auto-scale and aim at your subject
- Aim & Place — Aim at Object, Place at Camera, and the Reflection Placer: pick a point on your surface and the light positions itself so the specular highlight lands exactly there
- Save & recall whole lighting rigs as presets

Perfect for product viz, beauty & portrait lighting, look-dev and studio renders.

Requirements

- Autodesk Maya 2026 and above
- Arnold (MtoA) loaded
- Windows 10/11

Included: the plugin (one-click shelf installer), 145 EXR maps + thumbnails, and a full Installation & User Guide PDF. One-time purchase, free updates.

items.name: Smart Organizer + Scene Intel
items.description: One-click Maya scene organizer + health check. Sorts every node into layers and groups, flags scene problems, batch-renames, and profiles performance.
items.long_description:
Smart Organizer + Scene Intel

Stop hunting through the Outliner. Organize your entire Maya scene in one click. Smart Organizer scans your whole scene, sorts every node into clean Display Layers and Outliner Groups, and flags the problems hiding in your file — in seconds, not hours.

What it does

- One-click scan + sort — classifies geometry, rigs, deformers, curves, lights, cameras, locators, nDynamics, Bifrost, image planes and volumes into color-coded layers and tidy groups
- Display Layers + Outliner Groups — use either or both; every category gets its own colored layer and named group
- Custom categories — match by node type, name pattern, or both, for studio naming conventions
- Smart + safe — respects existing hierarchy, won't tear apart rigs; re-running reuses existing layers/groups (Merge / Skip / Replace), single undo
- Built-in renamer — batch rename, search & replace, prefix/suffix, trim, auto-numbering — selection-aware and undoable
- Scene Intel — health check: duplicate names, empty groups, unfrozen transforms, extreme scale, missing/default shaders, flat lighting, leftover history and more, each with severity and a one-click undoable fix; export a full report
- Performance Analyzer — scene totals, heavy meshes and cost hotspots so you can spot what's slowing the viewport

Why artists love it

- Turn a chaotic scene into a clean, navigable file in one click
- Stop manually dragging hundreds of nodes into groups and layers
- Catch scene problems before they reach lighting, rigging or render
- Non-destructive, idempotent and fully undoable; dockable dark UI

Requirements

- Autodesk Maya 2025 or newer
- Works alongside Arnold lights and standard Maya node types

What you get

- RFX Smart Organizer plugin with drag-and-drop installer and shelf button
- 12 built-in categories plus unlimited custom categories
- Renamer, Scene Intel and Performance tools

items.name: HDRI Studio Essential Kit
items.description: 90 HDR lighting maps in 8 folders — Basic, Dark, Sepia, Neon, Stripes, Tint, Vivid and Bonus. Each map is 10K x 5K, 32-bit HDR format. Compatible with any 3D renderer.
items.long_description:
HDRI Studio Essential Kit

HDRI Studio Essential Kit is a collection of 90 unique HDRIs. Each HDR is designed to give a unique and moody look to your renders. Each HDRI is 10K x 5K resolution in an HDR format (32 Bit). It is compatible with any 3D program. No more manual lighting for your scenes — just drop one HDRI and you're good to go. Enjoy.

What's Inside:

- 8 Folders
- Total 90 HDRI files
- Thumbnail preview for each HDRI

Folders:

- Basic (15 HDRI)
- Dark (10 HDRI)
- Sepia (10 HDRI)
- Neon (10 HDRI)
- Stripes (10 HDRI)
- Tint (10 HDRI)
- Vivid (10 HDRI)
- Bonus (15 HDRI)

All HDRIs are compatible with all render engines.

items.name: RFX Vault — Complete Bundle
items.description: Every Reimagine FX collection in one bundle. 12 complete collections, ~15 GB of maps, HDRIs, VDB clouds and cloth — royalty-free.
items.long_description:
RFX Vault — Every Reimagine FX Collection in One Bundle

Seven years of Reimagine FX collections, packed into one bundle. Every map, every HDRI, every VDB, every mesh — all here, all yours. If you've been picking up packs one at a time, this is the cheat code.

What's inside — 12 complete collections, ~15 GB, six categories

Terrains & Landscapes (5 packs)
- Terrain Collection Vol 1 — 6 hero terrains at 8K
- Terrain Collection Vol 2 — 6 more 8K terrains
- Canyon Collection Vol 1 — 10 canyons + 1 bonus, 4K
- Valley Collection Vol 1 — 20 valleys at 4K
- West Coast Vol 1 — 15 coastal terrains + bonus 4K (PNG + EXR)

Surface Maps (2 packs)
- Puddle Collection Vol 1 — 20 puddles with full PBR channels
- Rivulet Collection Vol 1 — 150+ greyscale rivulet maps at 4K

Atmospheric & VDB (1 pack)
- Cloud VDB Collection Vol 1 — 20 ready-to-render OpenVDB clouds

HDRI (1 pack)
- HDRI Studio Essential Kit — 90 mood-driven HDRIs at 10K×5K

Greyscale Maps (2 packs)
- Algorithmic Collection Vol 1 — 200 algorithmic 8K maps + 20 bonus
- Planetize Collection Vol 1 — 20 color + 20 greyscale 4K maps

Cloth & Simulation (1 pack)
- Cloth Collection Vol 1 — 100 static .OBJ cloth models + 1 animated alembic

By the numbers

- 12 collections
- 400+ displacement / greyscale maps
- 90 HDRIs at 10K×5K
- 20 OpenVDB clouds
- 100 cloth models + 1 animated alembic
- ~15 GB total

What you get on purchase

- All 12 collections as separate zips
- RFX Vault Catalog (PDF) — full visual asset inventory
- Lifetime re-download from your Gumroad library
- Royalty-free for commercial, broadcast, client and personal work
- Free updates to existing collections

Compatibility

Works in every major DCC — Maya, Cinema 4D, 3DS Max, Blender, Houdini, Modo — and every major renderer — Arnold, Octane, Redshift, V-Ray, Corona, ProRender, Cycles. Formats: TIFF, PNG (16-bit), OpenEXR (32-bit), HDR, OBJ, Alembic, OpenVDB.

items.long_description:
RFX Vault — Terrains & Landscapes Bundle

Six of my most-used terrain and landscape collections, packed into one bundle. From 8K hero displacement maps to coastal EXR terrains and planet-scale color maps — everything you need to sculpt entire worlds, at one price.

What's included — 6 collections

- Terrain Collection Vol 1 — 6 hero terrains at 8K (Displacement + Color + Normal)
- Terrain Collection Vol 2 — 6 more 8K terrains with diffuse + normals
- Canyon Collection Vol 1 — 10 carved canyons + 1 bonus, 4K
- Valley Collection Vol 1 — 20 valley maps at 4K, diffuse + normals
- West Coast Vol 1 — 15 coastal terrains + bonus 4K, PNG (16-bit) + OpenEXR (32-bit)
- Planetize Collection Vol 1 — 20 planet-scale color maps + 20 greyscale at 4K

By the numbers

- 6 complete collections
- 65+ terrain & landscape maps
- Resolutions up to 8K
- Displacement, Color, Normal & Greyscale channels
- A render preview for each terrain shape

Compatibility

Ready for Maya, Cinema 4D, 3DS Max, Blender, Houdini and Modo. Works with Arnold, Octane, Redshift, V-Ray, Corona, ProRender and Physical. Formats: TIFF, PNG (16-bit), OpenEXR (32-bit).

For environment artists, matte painters and daily-render artists who live in landscapes.

items.name: Nuke Diagnostic Suite
items.description: A technical diagnostics + intelligence panel for Foundry Nuke & NukeX. Find broken paths, risky graphs, colorspace issues and render bottlenecks before they bite.
items.long_description:
Nuke Diagnostic Suite

A technical diagnostics and intelligence panel for Foundry Nuke and NukeX. It helps compositors, supervisors and pipeline TDs inspect Nuke scripts for hidden technical issues before they become render problems, review notes, or late-night debugging sessions.

It works like a technical-direction layer inside Nuke: run diagnostics, review issues, inspect risk areas, navigate to problem nodes, create non-destructive overlays, and export clean reports for handoff or supervision.

What it helps you find

- Broken file paths and missing media
- Disconnected or risky node-graph structures
- Disabled critical nodes
- Format and frame-range mismatches
- Colorspace and OCIO pipeline risks
- Expensive nodes and render-cost bottlenecks
- Duplicate heavy operations
- Temporal instability signals
- Realism and CG-integration risk patterns
- Graph readability and organization problems

Main features

- Dockable and floating PySide6 Nuke panel
- Live dashboard with health score and issue count
- Severity-based issue table: info, warning, critical
- Clickable issue navigation back to Nuke nodes
- Comp Health, Temporal, Realism, Performance and Colorspace analyzers
- Node-graph intelligence + diagnostic overlay tools
- JSON, HTML, issue-bundle and performance-profile exports
- Clean dark professional UI, non-destructive by default

Built for

Nuke compositors, compositing supervisors, pipeline TDs, VFX studios, freelance artists, and technical QA before render submission.

Compatibility

Foundry Nuke / NukeX, target Nuke 15+ and 16+. Windows is the primary validated platform. Requires Nuke's bundled Python with PySide6. Includes the plugin, installer script, and user documentation PDF.

Safety: normal diagnostics inspect the current script and report findings only — they do not modify your comp. Overlay tools create temporary diagnostic nodes only when explicitly requested, with cleanup controls provided.

items.name: Viewport — 3D Viewer
items.description: Open, inspect & preview 3D files on iPhone. USD/USDZ native plus 20+ formats via the importer, AR preview, animation playback. On-device, no account.
items.long_description:
Viewport — Open, inspect & preview 3D files on iPhone

Viewport is a fast, focused 3D viewer built by Amar Shinde at Reimagine Fx. Open models straight from the Files app — iCloud Drive, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, Downloads or AirDrop — and inspect them in a clean, professional viewport. Orbit, study materials and scale, play animations, and preview in AR. No account. No cloud. No clutter.

Features

- Open almost anything — USD, USDZ, USDA, USDC and .reality load natively; OBJ, STL, PLY, FBX, glTF, GLB, DAE and 20+ more via the in-app importer
- Inspect like a pro — smooth orbit, pan, pinch-zoom, double-tap to frame; studio lighting presets with adjustable intensity
- Render channels — switch between shaded, albedo, normals, roughness and UV views
- Animation playback — node/transform animation and skeletal (bone) skinning on supported models
- AR preview — everything runs on-device; your files never leave your iPhone

Now live on the App Store.
